batch_metadata.note: Post-mega-cluster batch. Aug 8 re-opening of Aug 4-5 dispute noted. ROW-6819 coaching admission (RF-01 primary). ROW-7029 child relay demand noted as RF-07 peripheral.

unflagged_notable.message_text: ROW-7029 (Received): [Melissa demands Olivia call/contact Eli via child intermediary]
unflagged_notable.assessment: Child relay demand — Melissa directs communication through Olivia rather than directly to Eli. RF-01 primary mechanism (child as messenger). RF-07 peripheral: using child as communication relay channel is adjacent to multi-channel escalation (ADD consideration), but Eli's phone was accessible and this is a single message rather than a flooding or continuation pattern. Not RF-07 primary. Cross-ref RF-01 ARC-RF01-001.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE (promoted in B-017, S-001). Arc remains active; no new signals this batch. Post-mega-cluster context: Aug 4-5 episode closed; Aug 8 brief re-opening (noted in B-017 unflagged_notable) does not generate additional RF-07 signal.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Mixed — predominantly cooperative Aug 6-Sep 8 2024. Aug 6-7 post-mega-cluster cool-down. ROW-6819 coaching admission (Melissa tells Olivia what to say) is the batch's most significant event from RF-01 perspective. Sep 2024 more routine logistics.
batch_observations.rf07_assessment: Zero RF-07 primary signals post-mega-cluster. Aug 8 re-opening (4 messages, 4 days after mega-cluster closure) assessed as re-initiation rather than continuation — outside ADD-003 continuation-after-stop window. ROW-7029 child relay demand is RF-01 primary, RF-07 peripheral only. Arc active from B-017 but accumulating no new signals this batch.
batch_observations.custodial_context: Weekend parenting-time windows continue. No concentrated non-urgent contact into Eli's parenting time at ADD-004 threshold this batch.
